name: Holiday and Lofty
description:
Holiday and Lofty are a lesbian couple.

Holiday: An earth pony mare. She has moderate scarlet eyes, her mane/tail are a brilliant scarlet with light tangelo highlights. She has pale, light grayish amber fur. She is one of Scootaloo's aunts. Her cutie mark is a sailboat and a sun.

Lofty: A pegasus mare. she has moderate opal eyes. Her mane/tail are a moderate arctic blue with light cyan highlights. Her fur is a very pale yellow. She is one of Scootaloo's aunts. Her cutie mark is a needle and a spool of blue thread.
creator: Dom1990
